reference: BUT I KNOW HER BETTER AND I ASSURE YOU THAT SHE DOES IMPROVE SHE TRIES TO MEND HER FAULTS THOUGH SHE WON'T OWN IT AND WILL SURPRISE YOU SOME DAY BY THE AMOUNT OF HEART AND SENSE AND GOODNESS SHE HAS GOT
text: But I know her better, and I assure you that she does improve. She tries to mend her thoughts, though she won't own it, and will surprise you someday by the amount of heart and sense and goodness she has got.
